title: MongoDB Query Optimization Guide
content: Use compound indexes, avoid unbounded sorts, and use covered queries to improve MongoDB query performance.

title: Scaling Node.js APIs
content: Horizontal scaling, caching hot routes, and non-blocking I/O are core patterns for high-throughput Node.js APIs.

title: Designing Semantic Search
content: Semantic search compares vector representations of text instead of exact keyword matches, improving retrieval quality.
